name: Conkeldurr
flavor: Concrete mixed by Conkeldurr is much more durable than normal concrete, even when the compositions of the two materials are the same.

ability.name: Guts
ability.effect: If this Pokémon would be Knocked Out by damage from an attack, flip a coin. If heads, this Pokémon is not Knocked Out, and its remaining HP becomes 10.
